trans-unit.source: --pr and an explicit prefix path are mutually exclusive. Specify only one.
trans-unit.target: --pr and an explicit prefix path are mutually exclusive. Specify only one.

trans-unit.source: Print the actions that would be performed without modifying anything
trans-unit.target: Print the actions that would be performed without modifying anything

trans-unit.source: Not removed by `aspire uninstall` — handle manually:
trans-unit.target: Not removed by `aspire uninstall` — handle manually:

trans-unit.source: Specify what to uninstall: either --pr <N> or an explicit install prefix path.
trans-unit.target: Specify what to uninstall: either --pr <N> or an explicit install prefix path.

trans-unit.note: {0} is a short explanation produced by the planner.
{0} is the exception message from the first removal that failed.

trans-unit.source: Uninstall the PR / dogfood install at the default location (~/.aspire/dogfood/pr-<N>)
trans-unit.target: Uninstall the PR / dogfood install at the default location (~/.aspire/dogfood/pr-<N>)

trans-unit.source: Absolute path of the install prefix to uninstall
trans-unit.target: Absolute path of the install prefix to uninstall

trans-unit.note: {0} is the absolute path of the install prefix being uninstalled.
{0} is a short explanation produced by the planner.
{0} is the install route wire string (script / pr / winget / brew / dotnet-tool).

trans-unit.source: Aborted by user. Nothing was removed.
trans-unit.target: Aborted by user. Nothing was removed.

trans-unit.source: Skip the confirmation prompt and proceed with removal
trans-unit.target: Skip the confirmation prompt and proceed with removal
